ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock record */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company issuing the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock prices are denominated */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the trading day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the trading day */,
  "last_traded_price" REAL /* Last traded price of the stock */,
  "change_in_pts" REAL /* Change in points from the previous day's close */,
  "change_pct" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous day's close */,
  "year_high" REAL /* 52-week high price of the stock */,
  "year_low" REAL /* 52-week low price of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock related to the announcement */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date of the announcement */,
  "announcement_type" TEXT /* Type of announcement (e.g., dividend, annual meeting, earnings report) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full announcement document or press release */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Expected impact of the announcement on the stock price (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "announcement_text" TEXT /* Text describing the announcement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "historical_date" TEXT /* Date of the historical price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the date */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded on the date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market trading price */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* After-hours trading price */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the volume record */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded on that date */,
  "average_volume" REAL /* Average trading volume over a specified period (e.g., 30 days) */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Change in trading volume compared to the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_volumes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_watchlist" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock added to the watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User's notes or comments about the stock in the watchlist */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for alerts (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_watchlist_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_watchlist_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of index (e.g., market, sector, industry) */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock included in the index */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_indices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock for which the dividend is declared */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of dividend declared */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend announcement was made */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the record date for the dividend payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend is paid to shareholders */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date, when the stock starts trading without the dividend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
